title: Great Canadian Evangelion 10 Ticket Giveaway
wikitext:
[]: Great Canadian Evangelion 1.0 Ticket Giveaway             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Sep 18, 2009 6:41 pm k

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Fri Sep 18, 2009 7:15 pm TAMPABAY FLORIDA? WHAAAAAAAAAAT?

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Mon Sep 21, 2009 3:04 pm Heh...... Go Canadians!!! Woo Hoo. I entered in the contest a few minutes ago. I do need more tickets since a group of my friends and family has suddenly grown to 7 viewers strong. Hope i win. Yes..... EDIT: Well its September 21st already... and alas we still have no updates as to who won tickets. Come on people running the contest.....Hustle!!

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Sep 22, 2009 5:24 am Seems like the contest for this was cancelled just yesterday. Anime News Network took down any news reminders and contest reminders that have appeared on the site within the last four days. Though the contest link provided by NAveryM still seems to be active. Its been a day since ANN said they would release results and i think its somewhat fair to say that those wanting to see this movie shouldnt rely on this contest to do so. Buy your own tickets darn it!
